commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Nos enim didicimus libertatem, qua Dominus noster nos liberat a voluptatibus, eta cupiditatibus, et aliis perturbation bus solvens. "Qui dicit: Novi Dominum, et mandata ejus non set vat, mendax est, et in eo veritas non est"

commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: He that saith he knoweth Him, that Isaiah , with true and saving knowledge, such as leads to eternal life, and keepeth not His commandments is a liar. As the Apostle said ( Romans 1:21) of the philosophers who knew God, but only in a speculative and barren way, "When they knew God, they glorified Him not as God."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: He that says he knoweth him To know, in this and many other places, is not taken for a speculative knowledge alone, but is joined with a love of God, and an earnest desire of serving him and keeping his commandments. (Witham)
